exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales FROM "Order" AS o JOIN OrderItem AS oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS total_sales FROM "Order" AS o JOIN OrderItem AS oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' AND o.EffectiveDate <= '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY total_sales DESC LIMIT 1;
